turns.buyer: Hi, owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. I want to drop the asking from AED 18,500,000 to AED 17,760,000.
turns.bot: You'll make that change directly on dalya.ai/dashboard, it applies immediately once saved. I've looped Sophie in so you can sense-check the strategy before committing.

escalation.trigger_message: Hi, owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. I want to drop the asking from AED 18,500,000 to AED 17,760,000.

payload.requested_action: Discuss the requested listing change; actual edits remain dashboard-only.
payload.question_digest: What's the highest offer received so far? | Should I drop the price? It's been listed for a while now. | Can you tell me the names and contact details of the people who inquired? I want to follow up myself. | What's the typical timeline before I should expect a real offer? | Hi, owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. I want to drop the asking from AED 18,500,000 to AED 17,760,000.

turns.buyer: Can you make that change now?
turns.bot: Listing changes, including price and threshold updates, happen on your dashboard at dalya.ai/dashboard, not through chat. The change takes effect immediately once you save it there.

turns.buyer: Also, please notify everyone who's inquired in the last 30 days about the price drop.
turns.bot: Bulk buyer outreach is not actioned through WhatsApp. Keep the price update on dalya.ai/dashboard so the listing record is current and auditable. Buyer follow-up must stay controlled through the proper brokerage channel.

turns.buyer: What does dropping the price mean for the offers we've received? Tom Henderson offered 6.1M last week — does my drop trigger acceptance of his offer?
turns.bot:
A price drop doesn't automatically accept or affect existing offers. Those remain on the table as-is unless you choose to act on them.

For specifics on Tom's offer, the exact terms, timing, and what acceptance would mean for your net proceeds, head to dalya.ai/dashboard or let Sophie know you want to review it. If you're ready to accept, counter, or reject that offer, flag it.

turns.buyer: If I drop to AED 17,760,000 and someone offers AED 17,390,000, escalate that to me — I'm willing to negotiate down to AED 17,390,000.
turns.bot: Got it. Set that escalation threshold on dalya.ai/dashboard and I'll alert you on any offer at or above it. You can also give Sophie the figure and they'll set it with you.

turns.buyer: Actually wait. Don't drop the price. Let me think about it overnight.
turns.bot: No problem. The price stays as-is on your listing. Take the time you need, reach out when you've decided.

turns.buyer: OK morning of next day — please proceed with the drop to AED 17,760,000.
turns.bot: You'll make that change directly on dalya.ai/dashboard, it applies immediately once saved. I've looped Sophie in so you can sense-check the strategy before committing.
